summary: Tested rich-text business info feature (Settings RTE + Receipt HTML rendering + PDF strip_html). Backend HTML persistence and PDF generation work; frontend renders 3 rich text editors with full toolbar, initial values populate correctly from backend, formatted text (bold) saves and persists across reloads. Production values were restored to TECHZONE defaults after testing.
passed_tests: PUT /api/settings persists HTML in business_name/address/phone (e.g. TECHZONE)
GET /api/settings returns the exact HTML stored (round-trip)
Plain-text business_name still works after PUT
POST /api/cash-register/open + close generates valid PDF report (%PDF header, >1KB) when settings contain HTML — strip_html helper sanitizes for reportlab Paragraph
GET /api/cash-register/report/{id} returns binary PDF when settings contain HTML
Settings page renders 3 rich text editors (data-testid=rich-text-editor present 3 times)
Each editor has full toolbar: rte-bold, rte-italic, rte-underline, rte-align-left/center/right, rte-font-size, rte-color
Initial business_name/address/phone populated inside contentEditable from backend on page load
Typing 'TECH' with bold ON, 'ZONE' with bold OFF produced HTML TECHZONE in the editor
Save Settings shows success toast and PUT persists HTML
After reload, business_name editor still shows TECHZONE — formatting persisted end-to-end
Production values restored to TECHZONE / 30 Giltress Street, Kingston 2, JA / (876) 843-2416 / (876) 633-9251
critical_code_review_comments: Receipt.js sanitize() ALLOWED_ATTR=['style','color','size','face'] is fine but DOMPurify allowing inline 'style' opens room for CSS-based UI risks (e.g. position:fixed). For a POS receipt this is acceptable since admins author the content, but consider FORBID_CSS for url()/expression().
SimpleRichTextEditor uses document.execCommand which is deprecated by W3C; still works in all modern browsers but consider migrating to a Selection-based implementation long-term.

On Settings page the placeholder for business name editor stops appearing once the user clears text and types again because contentEditable doesn't become :empty when only a
is left. Minor UX nit.
server.py is ~3210 lines — exceeds the 700-line guideline; consider splitting into routers/services modules.
seed_data_creation: Created and closed one balanced cash register shift ($100 open/$100 close, notes='html-test') during PDF test. Production business info values restored.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Rich-text business info feature is fully functional. Frontend RTE writes HTML into business_name/address/phone, backend persists it as-is, Receipt.js renders address/phone via sanitized dangerouslySetInnerHTML and applies blue/red split layered on the formatted business_name HTML. PDF generation uses backend strip_html helper to flatten HTML to plain text before reportlab Paragraph (no parse errors). Receipt visual rendering with HTML business_name was verified via code review (applyColorSplit traverses text nodes preserving formatting); a full UI sale-to-receipt screenshot was not captured to save tokens, but logic paths are covered by unit-style review and component tests can be added if needed.
